results.title: Plan to raise some New London recreation center fees hits council roadblock
results.description: City councilor forces delay on vote to raise non-resident fees until hardship and scholarship program are better advertised.

results.title: Queen Anne's County Sheriff's Office welcomes two officers
results.description: CENTREVILLE — The Queen Anne’s County Sheriff’s Office has added Deputy First Class Lenox Trams and Deputy Thomas Endal to its staff of officers.

results.title: Department of Justice sues Maryland over contentious immigration bill
results.description: The U.S. Department of Justice filed a lawsuit Thursday against Maryland and Attorney General Anthony Brown, claiming an immigration bill — which has already drawn legal challenges from more than two-thirds of Maryland’s sheriffs — is unconstitutional.

results.title: New Affordable Housing Project For Seniors Coming To Whitpain
results.description: Groundbreaking was held on the project to help low income seniors who are getting priced out of the area.

results.title: How NATO is ‘turning the page on 80 years of history’, according to a former U.S. Ambassador
results.description: Christiane Amanpour speaks to former U.S. Ambassador to NATO Julianne Smith about the Ankara summit, Europe's push to strengthen its own security, and the future of the transatlantic alliance.

results.title: Former NATO commander urges bloc to give Trump ‘timeout’
results.description: NATO members should keep a low profile on meetings and joint activities in the next two years of Trump’s tenure, James Stavridis believes Read Full Article at RT.com

results.title: Former NATO commander urges bloc to give Trump timeout
results.description: The members should avoid vexing the US leader in the next two years to avoid breaking the bloc for good, James Stavridis has suggested NATO members should give US President Donald Trump a "timeout" for the rest of his tenure, reducing public exposure and joint endeavors to a bare minimum while working on bolstering their own military capabilities, retired US Navy Admiral and Supreme Allied Comman
